# Ghumo Firo Holidays

> Ghumo Firo Holidays is a Jaipur-based tour service led by a government-approved, licensed local guide with 5 years of experience. We create custom and ready-made Rajasthan and India tour packages — including the Golden Triangle (Delhi, Agra, Jaipur), heritage forts and palaces, Thar Desert safaris, and personalized private itineraries.

## Key facts

- Business type: Tour operator and licensed local guide service (TravelAgency / LocalBusiness)
- Based in: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India
- Founded: 2020
- Guide credential: Government of Rajasthan approved tourist guide, 5 years' experience
- Languages: English, Hindi
- Serves travellers from: 30+ countries
- Rating: 4.9/5 from 480+ reviews
- Best season to visit Rajasthan: October to March

## What we offer

- Golden Triangle tours (Delhi–Agra–Jaipur), typically 5–7 days
- Royal Rajasthan heritage tours (Jaipur, Pushkar, Udaipur, Jodhpur, Jaisalmer), 8–12 days
- Jaipur city tours and day trips (Amber Fort, City Palace, Hawa Mahal)
- Jaisalmer desert / camel safaris and desert camps
- Ranthambore tiger-safari add-ons
- Fully custom, private, tailor-made itineraries by interest, budget and dates
- Corporate travel, group tours, school/college trips, agent partnerships and DMC services

## Typical pricing (per person, per day)

- Budget travel: ₹3,000–₹6,000
- Mid-range: ₹6,000–₹12,000
- Luxury heritage: ₹12,000 and above
- Final price depends on hotels, group size, season and inclusions (guide, private transport, entry fees).

## Important pages

- Home: https://ghumofiroindia.com/
- All tours and packages: https://ghumofiroindia.com/tours
- Destinations (Jaipur, Udaipur, Jodhpur, Jaisalmer and more): https://ghumofiroindia.com/destinations
- Build a custom tour: https://ghumofiroindia.com/custom-tour
- About / meet the guide: https://ghumofiroindia.com/about
- Contact and enquiries: https://ghumofiroindia.com/contact
- Business and group travel: https://ghumofiroindia.com/business

## How to book or get a quote

Submit the booking or custom-tour form on the website, or contact the team by phone, email or WhatsApp. Replies are usually sent within 24 hours. Free cancellation is available up to 7 days before the tour.

## Contact

- Website: https://ghumofiroindia.com
- Email: info@ghumofiroindia.com
- Location: MI Road, Jaipur, Rajasthan 302001, India
